    int i;

        unsigned long addr = (unsigned long) sp+i;
        unsigned long val = (unsigned long) sp[i];

        if (sizeof(long) == 4)
            serverLog(LL_WARNING, "(%08lx) -> %08lx", addr, val);
        else
            serverLog(LL_WARNING, "(%016lx) -> %016lx", addr, val);
    }
}

  1119→/* Return a file descriptor to write directly to the Redis log with the

  1122→ * test) or when an API call requires a raw fd.

  1124→ * Close it with closeDirectLogFiledes(). */
  1125→int openDirectLogFiledes(void) {
  1126→    int log_to_stdout = server.logfile[0] == '\0';

  1128→        STDOUT_FILENO :

  1134→void closeDirectLogFiledes(int fd) {
